Home / Services / Blog Setup / Blog Starter

✍️ Blog Starter

Ready to start your blogging journey? We build your complete blog from scratch in any niche you choose — travel, finance, health and fitness, food, tech, lifestyle, parenting, or anything else. Your Blog Starter package includes a professionally designed WordPress blog with a premium theme customised to your brand colours and style, essential plugins (SEO, security, caching, analytics), 5 SEO-optimised launch posts written in your niche to give you a running start, category and tag structure planned for long-term SEO growth, and full setup of your homepage, about page, and contact page. We also configure your XML sitemap, Google Search Console submission, and basic on-page SEO so search engines can find you from day one. Perfect for aspiring bloggers, side-hustlers, and small businesses wanting to add a content marketing channel.

Service Details

Category: Blog Setup

Credits Price: 400 credits (approx. £500)

Turnaround: 5–8 days

How to Book

  1. Create a free account
  2. Purchase credits or subscribe to a plan
  3. Select this service and submit your brief
  4. Receive your completed project within 5–8 days
Book Blog Starter Now

Related Blog Setup Services

  • Blog Professional — Advanced blog build with custom design, 15 posts, email capture, monetisation setup, and content strategy. (1000 credits)
  • Blog Authority — Premium authority blog with 30 posts, full SEO campaign, membership area, and 6-month growth strategy. (2400 credits)

Why Choose Creative Kaygency for Blog Starter?

  • Professional quality at credit-friendly prices
  • Fast turnaround: 5–8 days
  • Satisfaction guarantee with included revisions
  • Track progress from your personal dashboard
  • Save up to 20% by paying with credits
